open_questions_resolved.question: OpenClaw definition gap (gates INS-019b)
open_questions_resolved.resolution: OpenClaw is an agentic AI harness running a chatbot inside Concord. Reachable via ssh corr@openclaw from orrion. INS-019b unblocked — authoring affordances implemented inside the OpenClaw harness as a tool/function emitting ChartAttachment messages on the Concord wire.
